---
title: "cars_plot"
author: "Z Shakkour"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Example

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

data(mtcars)

ggplot(mtcars, aes(x = factor(cyl))) +
  geom_bar() +
  xlab("Number of Cylinders") +
  ylab("Frequency")
```
